arts.ttl: Messi talks about his departure from PSG: "My intention was to return to Barcelona, but it was not possible"
arts.sum: At 37 years of age and the footballer with the most titles in the history of the game, Messi is well qualified to talk about a talent from La Masia, as he once was, who is now triumphing in the first team. Lamine Yamal has incredible qualities and is already one of the best players in the world

arts.ttl: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick in furious rant against La Liga: ‘I want to know who is responsible’
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has on Friday moved to make crystal clear his frustrations with the schedule-makers in Spanish football. This comes as his Barca side prepare for a…

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Neymar BACK to Barcelona, De Bruyne NEGOTIATIONS, Ancelotti SACK
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Neymar BACK to Barcelona, De Bruyne NEGOTIATIONS, Ancelotti SACK Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including the latest on Neymar, Kevin de Bruyne and Carlo Ancelotti.

arts.ttl: ‘Already one of the best in the world’ – Lionel Messi hails Barcelona starlet Lamine Yamal
arts.sum: Barcelona legend Lionel Messi has this week opened up on his appreciation for the talents of current Blaugrana youngster Lamine Yamal. Wide-man Lamine has for his part of course spent…

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé ‘a doubt’ to face Barcelona in Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid are sweating over the status of Kylian Mbappé for their upcoming showdown with Barcelona. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have on Friday provided an…

arts.ttl: Inter Milan dealt alarming injury blow ahead of Barcelona tie
arts.sum: Inter Milan, Barcelona’s upcoming opponents in the Champions League, have late this week announced a blow on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that Marcus Thuram is set for…

arts.ttl: Barcelona boss Flick provides Alejandro Balde injury update before Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has provided an update on the wellbeing of defensive star Alejandro Balde. This of course comes after the Spaniard, just last weekend, was condemned to…

arts.ttl: Barcelona second, Liverpool 7th - the best performing European clubs in 2025
arts.sum: With the Champions League and Europa League approaching their conclusions and May just around the corner, it’s certainly clear that the European football calendar is drawing to a close for...

arts.ttl: Flick rails at LaLiga schedule: 'It's a joke'
arts.sum: Hansi Flick praised his team's resilience with the club still competing on three fronts this season but complained about the timing of their next LaLiga match against Celta Vigo as he wanted to give his players some more rest.

arts.ttl: ‘What he’s doing is unthinkable!’ - Rafa Yuste praises Flick & talks Treble
arts.sum: Yuste was also asked about the European semi-final against Inter Milan and about Barça’s chances to win the Treble, and he used the same mantra from Flick: take it step by step, day by day. Barcelona sporting vice president Rafa Yuste spoke at an event on Thursday and was asked about the current affairs of the first team after securing a spot in the Champions League semi-finals.
